caveats.summary: Self-contained bundle verified booting from the Tender-managed location (po-mac, flight-deck PR 155): book-server + embedded Node sidecar serve /health from ~/Library/Application Support/Tender. Remaining: unsigned dev/eval build — first launch needs right-click → Open to clear Gatekeeper quarantine. Signing/notarization is the separate `released`-rung gate.

Audiobook (ffmpeg + python3) and prose-telemetry (python3) are optional features that spawn local tools at request time; they degrade gracefully (clear error) when absent. The core HTTP API is fully self-contained.
